description: FLUX.1-schnell + cute-comic-800 LoRA (fffiloni) — charming flat illustration / comic card style
_comment: LoRA trained with AI Toolkit by Ostris on FLUX.1-schnell base. Produces warm, children's-book-style flat comic illustrations.
_comment_model: Base model: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell — CFG-distilled 12B rectified-flow DiT. Gated: HF token required.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD: append 'in the style of TOK' to every prompt. Without it the LoRA style barely activates.
_comment_guidance: FLUX.1-schnell is CFG-distilled → guidance_scale MUST be 0.0.
_comment_steps: 4 steps is the schnell sweet spot. 1–8 steps are valid; more steps do not meaningfully improve quality for distilled models.
_comment_lora_scale: 0.9 is the default. Range 0.7–1.0; lower values blend LoRA style with base FLUX aesthetics.
_comment_weight_name: LoRA weights are in a single file: cute-comic-800.safetensors (diffusers load_lora_weights supports weight_name via lora_id).
_comment_size: 1024x1024 is the FLUX native resolution. Square format suits illustration cards well.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory — FLUX transformer is ~12 GB in bfloat16.
